description_long: This guard rail consists of a long, continuous barrier with a rugged, metallic appearance, designed to separate and protect areas along a roadway or path. The structure features a series of vertical posts supporting a main rail that runs parallel to the ground, with a profile that appears to be a W-beam or similar corrugated metal form. The surface is dark gray to black, with a weathered, matte finish, and the rail is anchored firmly into the ground, likely with embedded posts. The ends of the rail are slightly flared, providing a safer terminal treatment to reduce impact hazards. No reflective markings or panels are visible, and the overall construction suggests durability and resistance to environmental wear.
description: A long, rugged metallic guard rail with a dark, weathered finish, supported by vertical posts and flared ends, designed for roadside protection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, the central rail, and the flared ends with visible post supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear profile of the rail and the alignment of the posts along the base.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the continuous rail and the spacing between posts, as well as the flared terminal ends.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the rugged surface texture and the embedded nature of the posts in the ground.
